summary: Fix the stale Accessibility permission loop and add a floating hand-recognition test window.
scope: Stop automatically opening System Settings from the Start button and poll permission state until it becomes active.
Automatically continue startup after Camera and Accessibility permissions are both available.
Show a floating mirrored camera preview with live hand skeleton, pinch line, and recognition status.
Install the prototype at a stable /Applications/GestureControl.app path.
validation: release .app build and ad-hoc codesign verification
installed bundle reports version 0.1.1 and launches from /Applications
notes: The stale Accessibility record was reset after installing the final 0.1.1 binary; the user must grant the new record once.
Xcode 26.6 is installed, its License is accepted, and the standard XCTest target is available.
